Role: Build application, domain services, infrastructure scripts or documentation
Access level: Repository and task-scoped development access; no standing production secrets
Data access: Test/demo data only unless explicitly approved
IP created: Source code, tests, docs, deployment notes
Contract required: MSA/SOW with IP assignment, confidentiality, open-source disclosure and no retained secrets
Exit/handover requirement: Source history in CoriTech repo; setup docs; dependency list; open issues; access removal

Role: Product flows, UI system, editable designs and assets
Access level: Design workspace access; no production system access by default
Data access: Product context and approved demo data only
IP created: Editable design files, prototypes, assets, component notes
Contract required: Design/IP assignment or transferable license, font/asset license disclosure
Exit/handover requirement: Editable files transferred to CoriTech-controlled workspace; asset license list; export package

Role: Run web app, database/network infrastructure and deployment target
Access level: Cloud account admin/operator access only for CoriTech-approved admins
IP created: Configuration only; no product IP owned by vendor
Contract required: Provider terms, DPA if personal data/logs are processed, support/exit terms
Exit/handover requirement: Resource export; deployment runbook; backup/restore path; admin transfer path

Role: Hosted login, identity, MFA, password reset and email verification
Access level: Auth tenant admin access for CoriTech admins
Data access: Account identity data, auth events, provider subject and email
Contract required: Provider terms, DPA, admin/recovery ownership evidence
Exit/handover requirement: Tenant ownership export; OAuth client settings; user export path; recovery contacts

Role: Future payment processing or settlement evidence beyond manual references
Access level: No production payment account required in Phase 1
Data access: Phase 1 uses reference-only payment metadata; no card/bank data
Contract required: Future merchant agreement/KYC/DPA before real processing
Exit/handover requirement: Merchant ownership, settlement/bank handover and export path before activation

Access level: Provider account/API key controlled by CoriTech
Data access: Email address, rendered notification content, template context and delivery metadata
Exit/handover requirement: Sender/domain verification export; API key rotation; suppression/export process

Access level: Bucket/account admin access for CoriTech admins
Data access: Uploaded document bytes and storage metadata
IP created: None; storage provider owns commodity infrastructure only
Exit/handover requirement: Bucket policy export; versioning/backup settings; bulk export/restore path

Role: Store operational, proof, audit and document metadata
Access level: Database admin access for CoriTech admins
Data access: Core application data, audit logs and proof records
IP created: None; database provider owns commodity infrastructure only
Exit/handover requirement: Logical backup; restore drill; admin transfer path; export process

Role: Review lawful basis, DPA posture, privacy/security notes and vendor terms
Access level: Document review only unless separately approved
Data access: Legal analysis materials and approved data-flow summaries
IP created: Legal memos and review notes under agreed ownership/license
Contract required: Engagement letter, confidentiality, data-processing terms if needed
Exit/handover requirement: Final memos; open risks; action register; contact handover
